Resume

Surjit Singh

AI/ML & Python Engineer

Email LinkedIn GitHub

Professional Summary

AI/ML & Python Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable LLM platforms and distributed ML systems. Proven ability to modernize legacy architectures, integrate AI into production, and drive significant 27% cloud cost reduction and 30% API latency reduction. Expertise in GPU infrastructure, Kubernetes orchestration, and end-to-end ML/LLM pipeline development.

Experience

AI/ML & Python Engineer

BJS Home Delivery • 2023 – Present • Remote
  • Built self-hosted LLM platform (vLLM, Ollama, PyTorch, Chroma) with SSO & RBAC
  • Deployed GPU workloads on Kubernetes enabling scalable ML & LLM inference
  • Automated distributed training & deployment using Ray
  • Integrated AI workflows into legacy & new applications
  • 27% Cloud Cost Savings through optimization
  • 30% API Latency Reduction
  • 5 Legacy Systems Modernized

Tech Stack: vLLM, Ollama, PyTorch, Kubernetes, Azure Pipelines, Ray, Chroma, SSO, RBAC

Software Engineer (Python)

Connoisseur Infotech • 2021 – 2022 • Remote
  • Developed and optimized deep learning NLP models (BERT/Huggingface)
  • Improved BERT F1 score from 71 to 91 through model optimization
  • Reduced inference time by 20% through quantization and batch processing
  • Built Python REST APIs using Flask and FastAPI
  • Prepared and processed multilingual datasets

Tech Stack: BERT, Huggingface, Flask, FastAPI, NLP, PyTorch, Scikit-learn

Python Developer

Extech Digital • 2021 • India
  • Developed Python-based backend solutions using Flask
  • Contributed to front-end integration and API development
  • Built RESTful APIs for client applications

Tech Stack: Flask, REST APIs, Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS

Master of Computer Science

Chandigarh University • 2019 - 2021 • Chandigarh, India

Specialization: Machine Learning

Projects

Enterprise AI Chat Platform

Production-grade conversational AI platform with self-hosted LLM inference on in-house GPU infrastructure using vLLM for high-throughput, low-latency responses. Built as an agentic framework with pre-built agents, prompt libraries, and access control - enabling developers to simply integrate AI capabilities and deploy agents with their own logic.

Tech Stack: vLLM, PyTorch, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, RBAC, Chroma DB, OpenAI API (optional)

  • Self-hosted LLM on in-house GPU infrastructure with vLLM for 10x faster inference
  • ChatGPT-like conversational AI interface with enterprise-grade UI
  • Agentic framework with pre-built agents and customizable agent templates
  • Prompt library for reusability and consistent AI interactions
  • Fine-grained Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for multi-tenant isolation
  • Chroma DB for RAG and semantic search capabilities
  • Seamless OpenAI API integration as optional fallback for extended capabilities
  • Redis caching for instant response times and PostgreSQL for persistent storage

Kubernetes Hosting Platform

Production-ready Kubernetes hosting platform with all essential cloud-native tools pre-configured on a single VM for instant application hosting.

Tech Stack: Kubernetes, Azure, DevOps, Containers, NGINX, Vault, Argo CD

  • Pre-configured Kubernetes on a single VM
  • NGINX Ingress Controller for traffic management
  • HashiCorp Vault for secret management
  • Argo CD for GitOps-style deployments
  • Redis, Kafka, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Chroma DB for data workloads
  • Ready for development, edge, and production workloads

Microsoft Marketplace

Agentic Route Planner

Agentic LLM platform for intelligent route optimization with multi-modal transportation planning and real-time dynamic adjustments.

Tech Stack: vLLM, PyTorch, Kubernetes, NVIDIA TAO, LLM, Agentic AI

  • Intelligent route optimization with AI-driven planning
  • Multi-modal transportation planning (road, rail, air, sea)
  • Real-time route adaptation based on traffic and constraints
  • Scalable inference powered by vLLM
  • NVIDIA TAO for model optimization

Enterprise Identity Platform

Production-ready OAuth2 & OpenID Connect multi-tenant authentication platform built with Django for enterprise-scale identity management.

Tech Stack: Python, Django, OAuth2, OIDC, PostgreSQL, Redis, Azure AD

  • Full compliance with OAuth2 & OpenID Connect standards
  • Multi-tenant architecture with secure isolation
  • JWT authentication for secure token-based auth
  • Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with fine-grained permissions
  • Seamless integration with Microsoft Entra ID

GitHub

Kubernetes Auto-Scaling Platform

Production-ready Kubernetes VM with Azure VMSS for elastic, production-ready deployment with minimal infrastructure cost and seamless scaling.

Tech Stack: Kubernetes, Azure, VMSS, Keda, Argo CD, Velero

  • Multi-node Kubernetes cluster powered by Azure VMSS
  • Elastic scaling of worker nodes with Keda
  • Seamless integration with Argo CD and HashiCorp Vault
  • Supports Kafka, Redis, and MongoDB for scalable workloads
  • Calico CNI for secure, scalable networking

Microsoft Marketplace

Notification Service Platform

Enterprise-grade notification delivery platform handling outbound communication via Twilio and multiple providers. Built as a stateless FastAPI service with Kafka-based consumers for reliable event-driven messaging.

Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, Kafka, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Twilio, Protocol Buffers, Docker

  • Stateless FastAPI API with automatic documentation at /docs
  • Protocol Buffers for serialization with automatic pydantic model mapping
  • Kafka-based consumers for async event processing
  • MongoDB config collection for environment-specific settings (white-listed phone numbers, emails)
  • Twilio integration for SMS, WhatsApp, and Email delivery via multiple providers
  • Dockerized development environment with docker-compose
  • Pre-commit hooks for consistent code quality

Internal ML Platform

JupyterLab-based machine learning platform for model development, training, and experimentation with full experiment tracking.

Tech Stack: Python, PyTorch, JupyterLab, Kubernetes, MLflow, Docker

  • Interactive JupyterLab development environment for Python-based ML work
  • Full support for PyTorch and other ML frameworks
  • MLflow integration for logging experiments and models
  • Scalable model serving on Kubernetes
  • Containerized environment for reproducibility
